Technology and Innovation
Simplicando Processos.

Resources and solutions for intralogistics

Stock management and automation

Our solutions
Manage and automation

Manage your inventory in real time

TCIA solutions allow integrations with the most popular ERPS for easy management in real time on your phone or computer. Best and fast decisions can be made with efficiency using smart reports and KPIs in your operation.

Read more
Plainness
Governance in one contact point only
Time optimization
Tools integration with customers and suppliers
Cost optimization
Data organization and security / infrastructure
No hidden data
Operations tracking in real time
Custom solutions

Remote management on phone or tablet

High technology for company inventory database remote access provides fast, efficient and straightforward management. Our smart solutions integrated with SIAKI control towers also allows real time access to reports, KPIs and inventory on remote devices.

Read more
Innovation

We are experts in stock control, automation and intralogistics resources

We were born to simplify and innovate high complexity intralogistics operations. Since 2008, TCIA has developed custom technology solutions in Brazil in order to improve customers' results. Our search for excellence led us to become experts in stock management for engineering operations and communications network infrastructure. know-how para melhorar a performance de seus clientes. A TCIA em sua busca por excelência desenvolveu expertise na gestão de estoques para a área de engenharia de operações e manutenção para infraestrutura da rede de telecomunicações.

Read more
Easy process

Integrated management

We provide scalable solutions that follow your company operations growth.

We execute high performance technologies with trackable data, integrated communication, accuracy and geographic expansion for our customers.

Our systems offer a strategic view of the business and are important management tools for planning and decision-making.
